data.title: South Korea Dominates Global Crypto Trading with High Altcoin Activity
data.description:
South Korea accounts for 30% of the global cryptocurrency trading volume, with altcoins making up a significant 85% of this activity. According to BlockBeats, data from KaikoData reveals that Bitcoin and Ethereum represent only 9% and 6% of the market, respectively.

The average weekly trading volume on South Korean platforms reaches $2.622 billion, predominantly driven by altcoin transactions, indicating a strong speculative trend. In contrast, Japan's cryptocurrency trading volume remains stable at $2-3 billion monthly. Although Japan's volume is considerably lower than South Korea's, its Bitcoin market depth is three to five times greater, offering better liquidity.

data.title: The IRS has officially implemented new reporting standards for digital assets to curb tax evasion.
data.description: On April 15, the IRS officially entered a new phase of enforcement, with mandatory cost basis reporting requirements for digital asset brokers now fully effective for the 2026 tax year. Centralized exchanges, custodial wallet providers, and certain digital asset processors are required to issue Form 1099-DA to the IRS and taxpayers, documenting every sale and transaction of digital assets. The IRS stated that this move aims to close a long-standing "compliance gap" and align crypto reporting standards with traditional stocks and bonds. The new rules require brokers to track the "cost basis" of each asset from acquisition to disposal, and taxpayers must be able to verify the specific purchase price and date of each token sold. The Treasury Department has introduced a simplified electronic consent process, allowing brokers to terminate their partnerships with clients who refuse to participate in the new reporting framework. Although the Trump administration has ordered the repeal of the "DeFi broker" designation that considered front-end service providers like Uniswap as reporting entities, the IRS stated that it will track on-chain activity through advanced forensic audits, and investors using self-custodial wallets to "evade" reporting requirements face higher audit risks. (FinanceFeeds)

data.title: STOCKS | Sig Energy Surges Over 97% in Pre-Market Trading Ahead of Hong Kong Exchange Debut
data.description: Sig Energy (06656.HK) experienced a significant increase in pre-market trading today, with its stock price soaring over 97%. According to Jin10, the company's latest market valuation has surpassed HKD 150 billion. Sig Energy is set to officially list on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on April 16.

data.title: Binance Wealth Management: Subscribe to buy cryptocurrencies at a discount and earn up to 50% annualized return.
data.description: According to official news, Binance Wealth Management is increasing annualized rewards for all users who purchase cryptocurrency at a discount to provide better service. During the promotion period, users who subscribe to any discounted cryptocurrency purchase product can enjoy an annualized return of up to 50%. Promotion period: April 15, 2026, 16:30 to May 16, 2026, 07:59 (UTC+8). How to participate: During the promotion period, subscribing to any discounted cryptocurrency purchase will give you the opportunity to buy cryptocurrency at a price lower than the market price, or enjoy an annualized return of up to 50% depending on market trends.

data.title: Pakistan Lifts Ban on Banking Services for Virtual Asset Entities
data.description: Pakistan's central bank has lifted a ban imposed in 2018, allowing banks to open segregated, non-interest-bearing accounts in Pakistani Rupees for entities licensed by the Pakistan Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority. According to Foresight News, banks are required to conduct due diligence before providing these services.

data.title: Polkadot Attackers Transfer Funds to Tornado Cash
data.description: Arkham announced on the X platform that the attackers involved in the Polkadot bridge incident have transferred all their funds to Tornado Cash, totaling $269,000. According to Odaily, this move follows the recent attack on the Polkadot network, where significant funds were compromised. The transfer to Tornado Cash, a privacy-focused cryptocurrency mixer, raises concerns about the traceability of the stolen assets. Authorities are investigating the incident to determine the identities of those responsible and to recover the funds.

data.title: Binance Offers Up to 50% APR on Discount Buy Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is enhancing its user experience by offering boosted Annual Percentage Rates (APRs) for Discount Buy users. During the promotion period from 2026-04-15 08:30 (UTC) to 2026-05-15 23:59 (UTC), users subscribing to any Discount Buy product can enjoy an APR of up to 50%. This initiative allows participants to buy cryptocurrency at prices lower than the market rate or earn substantial APR rewards based on market performance.

Discount Buy is a non-principal-protected, high-yield structured product. Users are advised to thoroughly understand the Discount Buy Terms & Conditions before subscribing. Each product has a preset Target Buy Price, Knockout Price, APR, and Settlement Date. Upon settlement, outcomes vary based on the Settlement Price. If the Settlement Price is greater than or equal to the Knockout Price, users receive their full investment back along with APR rewards. If the Settlement Price falls between the Target Buy Price and Knockout Price, users buy crypto with 50% of their investment at the Target Buy Price, with an average APR over 110%. If the Settlement Price is less than or equal to the Target Buy Price, users buy crypto with their entire investment at the Target Buy Price.

Binance emphasizes that once subscribed, users cannot edit, cancel, or redeem their subscription before settlement. The platform reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or tampering with program code. Additionally, Binance may amend or vary terms and conditions without prior notice, including canceling or extending the promotion. Users must complete identity verification and register during the promotion period to qualify for rewards. Sub-accounts are not considered individual participants, and regional availability may vary.

data.title: Arkham: Bridged Polkadot attackers transferred $269,000 in stolen funds to Tornado Cash
data.description: Arkham posted on the X platform that the Bridged Polkadot attackers have transferred all funds to Tornado Cash, amounting to $269,000.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stocks Close Higher with Tech Sector Leading Gains
data.description:
Hong Kong stocks experienced a mixed trading session on April 15, 2026, with the market opening higher but experiencing fluctuations throughout the day. According to Jin10, the Hang Seng Index closed up 0.29% at 25,947.32 points, while the Hang Seng Tech Index rose 1.23% to 4,911.79 points. The total market turnover for the day was 245.588 billion Hong Kong dollars.

In terms of sector performance, the innovative drug sector showed strong gains, and the JD.com concept stocks also moved higher. Conversely, the shale gas sector and Foxconn concept stocks declined. Among individual stocks, Xuanzhu Biopharmaceuticals-B (02575.HK) surged 10.5%, Rongchang Biopharmaceuticals (09995.HK) rose over 9%, and 3SBio (01530.HK) increased by more than 8%. Laopu Gold (06181.HK) gained 6.8%, JD.com (09618.HK) climbed 4.6%, while Alibaba (09988.HK), JD Health (06618.HK), Trip.com Group-S (09961.HK), and Baidu (09888.HK) all rose by over 3%.

On the downside, Zhihu (02513.HK) and Xunlei (03317.HK) both fell by 8.5%, New Oriental Education & Technology Group (09901.HK) dropped nearly 6%, and Tianqi Lithium (09696.HK) and Ganfeng Lithium (01772.HK) both declined by 5%. Li Ning (02331.HK) decreased by 4.6%.

data.title: IRS to Implement Mandatory Cost Basis Reporting for Digital Asset Brokers by 2026
data.description:
The U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) will enforce new regulations for digital asset brokers starting April 15, 2026. According to BlockBeats, the rules will require centralized exchanges, custodial wallet services, and certain digital asset processing entities to submit Form 1099-DA to both the IRS and taxpayers. This form will document the sale and exchange of digital assets.

The initiative aims to reduce underreporting of capital gains from digital assets and align cryptocurrency tax reporting standards with those of traditional securities. Investors will need to maintain accurate records of purchase prices, transaction dates, and on-chain activity for their tokens.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Peter Schiff Predicts Gold and Silver Surge Amid Dollar Decline
data.description: Peter Schiff has highlighted a significant movement in precious metals, noting that silver has climbed back above $80. According to NS3.AI, Schiff also forecasts that gold could surpass $5,000. He further commented on the U.S. dollar, stating that it has lost all of its gains from the Iran war as metals continue their upward trajectory.

data.title: McCormick's MSX total trading volume surpasses $30 billion, and it also launches its "Anniversary Celebration Season" campaign.
data.description: According to data from the official website of MSX, a US stock token trading platform, the platform's total trading volume has officially exceeded $30 billion in the year since its establishment, with a cumulative user base of over 180,000. In the past year, it has successively completed several key milestones, including the launch of its Beta version, the opening of its on-chain US stock token market, the public beta testing of US stock token perpetual contracts, a brand upgrade, and the launch of its Pre-IPO section. MSX has also launched its "One-Year Anniversary Celebration Season" event, running from 00:00 on April 15, 2026 to 23:59 on April 24, 2026 (UTC+0), with a total prize pool and peripheral benefits worth $41,500. These include four sections: new customer welcome gifts, limited-time trading for exclusive blind boxes, a $35,000 prize pool for all traders, and referral rewards, with the highest prize being 3,000 USDT and MSX collectible gold notes.

data.title: Broadcom Stock Rises 2.9% in Pre-Market Trading as Meta Extends Custom Chip Agreement
data.description: Broadcom's stock experienced a 2.9% increase in pre-market trading following the announcement of an extended agreement with Meta for custom chip production. According to Jin10, this development highlights the ongoing collaboration between the two companies, aiming to enhance Meta's technological capabilities through tailored semiconductor solutions. The agreement is expected to bolster Broadcom's position in the tech industry, reflecting the growing demand for specialized chipsets in advanced digital applications.

data.title: LI.FI Launches New Product to Enhance On-Chain Earnings for Enterprises
data.description: Cross-chain protocol LI.FI has announced the introduction of its latest product, LI.FI Earn, aimed at enterprises with digital asset strategies. According to Foresight News, this new offering provides on-chain earning capabilities and supports strategies through a single integration with over 20 vault protocols. Additionally, LI.FI Earn features cross-chain execution capabilities across more than 60 chains.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs See Continued Inflows, Led by Fidelity's FETH
data.description: US spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net inflows totaling approximately $53.03 million on April 13, marking the fourth consecutive day of positive flows. According to NS3.AI, data from SoSoValue indicated that no funds recorded net outflows during this period. Fidelity's FETH was the leading contributor, with inflows amounting to $38.06 million.

data.title: LI.FI launches LI.FI Earn, an on-chain yield product for institutions.
data.description: Cross-chain protocol LI.FI announced the launch of its new product, LI.FI Earn, which provides on-chain yield functionality for enterprises with digital asset strategies. It supports strategies that can access more than 20 vault protocols through a single integration and has built-in cross-chain execution capabilities across more than 60 chains.

data.title: Iran Seeks Alternative Ports to Bypass U.S. Blockade
data.description: Iran is planning to utilize alternative ports to circumvent the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. According to BlockBeats, this move was reported by Iranian media outlet MEHR on April 15. The strategy involves using ports other than those in the southern region to mitigate the impact of the blockade.

data.title: Iran will use alternative ports to bypass the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: According to Iran's Mehr News Agency, Iran will use alternative ports outside of its southern ports to bypass the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. (Xinhua)

data.title: Nomura Securities: Indonesia's Central Bank Likely to Maintain Interest Rate at 4.75% This Year
data.description: On April 15, Nomura Securities economists reported that Indonesia's central bank is likely to keep its policy rate unchanged at 4.75% throughout the year, as it remains focused on stabilizing the Indonesian rupiah. According to Jin10, the bank maintained its rate in March and adopted a more hawkish stance, dismissing earlier expectations of a rate cut later this year. Nomura stated, 'Currently, we do not anticipate a rate hike by Indonesia's central bank, but if balance of payments pressures intensify and the bank's reserve adequacy indicators decline significantly, the risk will increase.'

data.title: Strategy's Target Price Raised to $385 by TD Cowen
data.description: TD Cowen has maintained its buy rating on Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, and increased its target price to $385. According to NS3.AI, Lance Vitanza made this decision regarding the company known for its Bitcoin reserves.
